titleStmt.title: SII 31.228: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 228. (A.R. No. B 291 of 1936.) MADDIKERA, PATTIKONDA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: A pillar set up in a row at the top of the flight of steps in front of the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated in the Śaka 1603, Durmati, Śrāvaṇa ba. 12, Monday corresponding to 1681 A.D. August 18.

It records the gift of wet-land of sowing capacity of one tūmu and four muntas to four persons Jaṁggam, Veṁggayya Śiddaya and Pāpaya, the sons of a stone mason (Kāsē) Chiṭṭi pottu Akkā battu with the permission of the village officials Reḍḍi and Karaṇams for planting the Vuṭṭlakaṁbālu in Chenakēśava temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyu
daya śālivāha
na śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1603 Agunēṭi du
¨rmatināma saṁvatsa
raṁ śrāvaṇa ba 12 sōma
vāraṁ śrīmadakhilā
ṁḍa kōṭi braṁhāṁḍa
nāyakulaIna maḍḍi
kera cenakēśava dēvuni
ki yī vuṭlakaṁbhālu
śēsi nilpiṁcinaṁduku
rājeśrī dēvanako
ṁḍa boppināya
ni kumāruḍu rāma
ppanāyanivāru kā
śaciṭi pottu Akkā
bhattuni kumāḷlu jaṁ
ggamū veṁggayya śidda
ya pāpayagāru
janālu naluguriki

maḍḍikera grāmāna
jāli vāgu tū¨rpu
dēvanavāgusdhaḷaṁ
rēgaḍi mānyaṁ khōdā
ku pritigānu Icci
nadi Ö . tūme
ḍu nālugu muṁ
ttalu cēnu reḍḍigara
ṇālaku paṁḍeṁdū
Āyagāṁḍlaku samma
taṁgānu Iccināru
gasaka mīputra pau
tra pāraṁparyaṁtta
ṁgā Ācaṁdrākasthā
Igā Anubhaviṁcēdi A
ni vrāśina bhūdāna dha
rmaśāsanaṁ . Iṁdduku
yavuru Āccēdana cēstā
vuṁnārō vārivāri kulācāra
dharmānaku tappinapāpaṁ Anu
bhaviṁcēru .
Digital edition of SII 31.228 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
